instructions.instruction: Use this skill when the task is to create or improve test coverage for a Rails engine.
instructions.original_snippets: Use this skill when the task is to create or improve test coverage for a Rails engine.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger test-engine.

instructions.instruction: **EVERY engine MUST have a dummy app for testing.**
instructions.original_snippets: **EVERY engine MUST have a dummy app for testing.**
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger test-engine.

instructions.instruction: Add the smallest integration test that proves mounting and boot work. **Verify it passes before continuing** — if it fails, check `engine.rb` initializer order and mount configuration rather than adding more specs on top of a broken foundation.
instructions.original_snippets: Add the smallest integration test that proves mounting and boot work. **Verify it passes before continuing** — if it fails, check `engine.rb` initializer order and mount configuration rather than adding more specs on top of a broken foundation.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger test-engine.

instructions.instruction: Verify: dummy app exercises real host integration; routes tested through engine namespace; configurable seams covered with at least one non-default case; generators safe to run twice.
instructions.original_snippets: Verify: dummy app exercises real host integration; routes tested through engine namespace; configurable seams covered with at least one non-default case; generators safe to run twice.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger test-engine.
